entry.title: How do we enable deletion of active entries when using CDS based OData services with BOPF?
entry.content:
We have a CDS based OData service to perform CRUD operations, feeding a custom Fiori application. We are able to do all of the operations except delete.

We redefined the /BOBF/IF_LIB_DELETE_ACTIVE~DELETE_ACTIVE_ENTITY method, but did not write anything in it.

The service returns a successful response (HTTP 204) when delete is called with the primary keys, but the table still has the entry. 

Any suggestions on what to check?

entry.title: Re: Excel SDK installation in MAC OS for build process automation
entry.content: Hello Rakesh, Thanks for reaching out to us. Are you experiencing any errors? If so, could you please provide more details or a screenshot? This would greatly assist us in further investigating the issue.

entry.title: Re: Customize GST report in SAP B1
entry.content: I have reviewed it, but my query is about how to add the the document series field to this report? as it is not mentioned on how to edit the query. if you can please guide.

entry.title: Questions about locked/expired users
entry.content:
Hello everyone!
I am a beginner in SAP and I would like to ask you three questions:
1 - Can an SAP user with an expired account due to a defined user validity account (GLTGB) log on to the system?
2 - Is there any note from SAP about good practices to lock users even if there is an previous validity date on the account?
3 - Is there any SAP manual that mentions the validity of users and the impossibility of accessing the system with an expired account?

entry.title: Re: How to modify Notafiscal tax values in MIRO
entry.content:
None of the method has nota Fiscal details in interface.
Can you please elaborate how you did it?

entry.title: Re: No of Same Work Center
entry.content:
Hello @raviram08 

One of the possible modelling approaches is to have a single workcenter for all 7 lathe machines, model each machine a single capacity and maintain 7 capacities in the workcenter.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to run an VBscript in sap build process automation
entry.content: Hello Balaji, Thank you for reaching out to us. You cannot directly use VB code in the Custom Script feature; it is intended for customer JavaScript within SAP BPA.

I have three templates.

-OBGT -BGT1 -BGT2

entry.title: Re: How to send mail to a specific vendor by clicking on output type for VF02
entry.content:
Hi , I hope your issue would have been already solved.

My requirement is almost same but to trigger it on save , can help with it . I want to know how it capture data/records .. or it automatically selects the current record.. plz help me.

entry.title: Re: SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST FOR WORKFLOW APPROVAL
entry.content: Hi, You may use the 'Supplier Invoices List' app to view the list of invoices and their approval status. You can filter the invoices using the 'Status' field, and then enable the fields ' Approval Status' & 'Approver' to view the approver details.

entry.title: Re: 物料出库科目替代
entry.content:
Jason2406 你好：

该需求无法实现，一般的思路是为不同类型的销售场景来创建不同的移动类型，以达到可以决定不同科目的目的。虽然公有云可以创建Z的移动类型，但是SD模块决定发货单移动类型的配置Schedule line category目前还没有开放，只能使用系统标准的。所以科目决定也只能沿用标准配置。

entry.title: Re: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Field...
entry.content: Ola Jitin,

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content:
I have tried but can seem to get it to work Below is a portion of the script in the formatting:

sub FormatEntity(s)
dim ExAttName
dim FundamentalSA
dim EntityClass
dim FillColour
dim boolFormatEntity
dim o
set o = s.Object

output "############## FormatEntity ##############"
output o
output o.ClassKind
output o.ClassName

dim test1
dim test1object
dim test2

test1 = o.TargetObject
output "test1 " & test1
test1object = test1.object
test2 = test1object.GetExtendedAttributeText(ExAttName)
output "test2 " & test2

Output statements: 

### Symbol : Agreement of ClassKind= -2044982537 ClassName= Entity Symbol
############## FormatEntity ##############
Shortcut of entity 'Agreement'
908935660
Shortcut of entity
test1 Entity 'Agreement'

 

I get an error:

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request failed with status code 401
entry.content:
This is a fiori application generator version issue run below command and it will solve this issue

npm install -g @Sap/generator-fiori@latest

you can check the version on 'i' button.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/6be8f10030d848e785ebe680a43c34e2.html?version=2408.500

entry.content:
Hello 😊,

Here is my submission for Task 2: 

Thanks and regards,                                                                                                                                            Oana

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...
entry.content:
Could you post MB51 for material and check how you received that inventory on ECC? Did it come from 701 or 702 or 711 or 712 and what is user ID that posted the inventory -- what is the posting and creation date?

Also add the documents on the EWM side that you have performed for this product--My understanding your stock will only go to ECC or S4 Core when you post the differences.

Please double check movement history and also confirm when you posted the differences to ECC?

Another thing to check to make sure you do not have any errors in message queue --WM MON-->Tools --Message Queue

entry.title: Re: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Field...
entry.content: Hello Jitin Thanks for the answer, but the problem is precisely because ITM7 has a child object (ItemsDepreciationParameters), but they have the fields I need and the ITM8 table does not have an object related to the Item

entry.title: Re: Registration For SAP TechEd Virtual In 2024 Is Now Live!
entry.content:
@StephanieMarley I look for developer sessions that I categorize as unmissable and try to block that slot in my calendar. Worst case I watch the recorded session, but then I miss the live Q&A.

The rest of the time I try to leave a 'live' channel running in the background while I am working. If I pick up on something piques my interest I focus on it. It's also a useful way for me to pick up on content I may have missed when looking through the schedule.

I am excited to join Digital Skills Initiative to upskill my skills in SAP. I am waiting eagerly to join Digital Skills Initiative

Thank You

Regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: VS Code SAPUI5 Adaptation project error - Request fai...

This is a fiori application generator version issue run below command and it will solve this issue

npm install -g @Sap/generator-fiori@latest

you can check the version on 'i' button.

entry.title: Re: Using BTP Authentication and Destinations with SAP Build Apps (formerly AppGyver) *and deploy it
entry.content: I solve the issue by changing the authentication method for the SF destination in BTP cockpit from OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion to the BasicAuthentication. Now it works and I need to figure out how to customize the oauth2 method properly but that's another story.

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: Take a look at some of the standard scripts, such as "C:\Program Files\SAP\PowerDesigner 16\VB Scripts\List Tables.vbs"

entry.title: Re: SAP Builds Apps using BTP Destination - 500 Internal server error: Unable to fulfill proxy requ
entry.content:
Hi mep,

I solve the issue by changing the authentication method for the SF destination in BTP cockpit from OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion to the BasicAuthentication. Now it works and I need to figure out how to customize the oauth2 method properly but that's another story.

entry.title: SAP PO inboundRA configuration
entry.content:
Dear SAP guys .

I have one simple question , e.g an ERP system wants to send IDOC to SAP PO and we have requirement to configure inboundRA connection , so there are 3 different clients on ERP so do we need to configure 3 cloned RA for that or one inboundRA ADAPTER will work ?  Please help to clarify 

Regards

Ashish Goswami

entry.title: Positive/Negative List and B1 Scenario Screening
entry.content:
Hello,

I just want to get confirmation from the group regarding this topic.

Set-up: Customer places BP on Negative list via BP transaction. However, BP transaction sometimes is flaky and the '2' was not saved in the Pos./Neg, field. So, when the B1 Screening took place, the customer was released.

When the customer finds that the BP was released, customer placed in Negative list again. This time the '2' was saved in the Pos./Neg, field. AS you know, when the next B1 Screening is negative, the BP is not released, because it is ignored, see OSS KBA 1461694.

However, when the customer goes into the Screen Neg. List Bus. Partner Addresses, the status shows a green check mark showing 'released'.

As I have tried to explain to my customer, that was the status of the last B1 screening that the BP was processed. Now that the BP has been placed in the Negative List, the following B1 screening ignored the BP and therefore does not update the audit trail.

I explained to the customer to check the current status of the BP, use Display Blocked Business Partners or Display Negative List Business Partners.

So, for confirmation, since the BP is on the Negative List, B1 screening ignores the BP and does not update the SPL audit trail... and the the audit shows the results of the later successful processing of the BP through the SPL screening scenarios.

Thank you in advance.

Regard, Dean.

entry.title: Business Application Studio - Preview language
entry.content:
Hello Community,

When I start an application in BAS, it is automatically executed in an English-language launchpad. Can this be changed?

 

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: Securing RISE with SAP
entry.content: Regards connectivity to external systems, obviously I get why this is limited, but equally it's a fundamental requirement in many scenarios. Are you still able to do external HTTP API calls from RISE to 3rd party systems via a proxy in SM59, or is this ability now tied to an implementation of SAP Integration Suite (or similar connector) alongside it?

We are on S/4. These are IM physical inventory documents, not WM or EWM relevant PI documents. This count document is the first count document for this batch in this sloc. The same user that completed the PI count above posted the only movement below. 

Complete MB51 history for this material/batch in this sloc -

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Gerhard,
Thanks for the interesting blog, very useful!

One question I have with the classic intercompany sales is when the Intercompany Invoice is generated, I can now see in your overview that only an IDOC is sent to the other company. Can we add a PDF Print in that process step as well?

Thanks!
Stefanie

entry.title: Re: Copy control from SO to PR/PO
entry.content:
Hi Connie,

you find the configuration option in SSCUI 105962 (Define Copying Rules for Item Texts in Purchase Requisitions). 

Here you have the option the maintain, which texts from various sources (e.g. sales order) will be transferred into which PR item text type. Documentation for this SSCUI is included in the CBC.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Existe el proceso de Renovacion en SAP S/4HANA Cloud...
entry.content: Thank you very much, I will make the scenario

entry.title: Re: Rehire with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: From Exit to Re-entry
entry.content:
@Komal2 

No, and that is the reason we didn't implemented Rehire via ONB in our system, and we have to do it manually. I opened an enhancement for this: Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com) I would love to have your vote and comment over there as well.

Thank you,

Efrat

entry.title: Re: Extension2 to be used in BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE
entry.content:
LOOP AT extension2 INTO DATA(ls_extension2).

CASE ls_extension2-param.
"As a structure in row 0
WHEN lc_vbpok. "Fields for LIKP
IF ls_extension2-value IS NOT INITIAL.

MOVE ls_extension2-row TO lv_item.
ls_vbpok-zz1_boothso1_dli = ls_extension2-value.
MODIFY ct_vbpok FROM ls_vbpok TRANSPORTING zz1_boothso1_dli.
* cs_vbpok-
* ASSIGN (lc_cs_vbkok) TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_vbkok>).
* IF <lfs_vbkok> IS ASSIGNED.
* ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_extension2-field OF STRUCTURE <lfs_vbkok> TO <lfs_fieldname>.
* IF <lfs_fieldname> IS ASSIGNED.
* <lfs_fieldname> = ls_extension2-value.
* ENDIF.
ENDIF.
* ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Error when publishing cds
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: Re: Geo modeling in Datasphere with SAC Geo map
entry.content: @TM62 , you could load from any data source with longitude and latitude. Loading data can be done via Data flow

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Extra 2 fields

entry.title: Approve a document via Service Layer when identity provider is enabled - SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I need to approve a document via Service Layer.
The API call below allows me to approve a document when the 'SAP B1 Authentication Server' identity provider is disabled.

PATCH https://myhost:50000/b1s/v1/ApprovalRequests(1)

{
"ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
{
"Status": "ardApproved",
"ApproverUserName": "User1",
"ApproverPassword": "User1Password",
"Remarks": "Approved - OK"
}
]
}

Could you share the API call details I can use when the 'SAP B1 Authentication Server' identity provider is enabled please?
Where can I find documentation for the ApprovalRequestDecisions API call please?

I'm using SLD Version: 1000210

Thank you,
Best Regards,
Claudio

entry.title: Re: Difference between IM ( Investment ) and PPM ( Projec...
entry.content:
IM has been around a long time and is still functional but it hasn't been upgraded in along time.  It is part og core ERP.

All new development has been around PPM which has much more robust portfolio and project management capabilities and a better user experience.  PPM was designed to be a standalone system as well as natively integrated to SAP.   

IM:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/a6bcb3e6679b4a31a9441939ec9430db/f25fba53422bb54ce10000000a174cb4.html

PPM: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/db719753e69f4e8eb9902aaea0fd8471/385fdc0a73b546328417b9708248fc80.html

entry.title: Re: Report stories - Recruiting doesn't show in available data even when it's been added to permissi
entry.content: This solved my problem https://me.sap.com/notes/0003042974 had to get Support to run some jobs to get the Recruiting schema to show up

entry.title: Re: Report stories - Recruiting doesn't show in available...
entry.content: This solved my problem https://me.sap.com/notes/0003042974 had to get Support to run some jobs to get the Recruiting schema to show up

entry.title: How does Half day holiday displayed in table TFACS
entry.content:
Hi all

We are using table TFACS in order to load dates to Data Sphere
and it works fine

We have a need to hold Half days, we have found that we can maintain Half Day holiday in Holidays Calendar and assign it to factory calendar

But after that if we look at table TFACS we see a value of '0' for that day

In SAP Datasphere we would like to use the standard date functions of WORKDAYS_BETWEEN etc. and it works fine now without the Half Day issue

 

Any help will be appreciated

 

Shlomi

entry.title: SlipstreamEngine: Back Button disappears when hiding the menu bar
entry.content:
Hello Community

When Hiding the complete Menu-bar on Top within Slipstream (SE), the Back button will also disappear. I believe this was not the way it used to be in an earlier version... do you have the same behaviour or do you know any way how to keep the original Back button?

Personas SP18, SAPUI Version 1.71.58

Regards, Nicolas

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: Hi, two things. You should user Set command to assign objects to your variables: Set test1 = s.Object (instead of wrong test1 = s.Object). And second, make sure, that the model containing original entity object is opened. Otherwise PD cannot access it to read the values of your extended attributes. Regards, Ondrej

entry.title: Re: Copy adobe form -MM_PUR_RFQ_INTERNAL fragment based
entry.content:
Hello Daniel

I have the same issue , i have downloaded the master form with the form, but the layout of the MM_PUR_RFQ_INTERNAL remain gray.

Have you found a solution to have the layout available?

Hope you can help ...

BR

Anke

entry.title: Re: Email configuration in S/4Hana Public Cloud for Purch...
entry.content:
Hello,

I am not sure whether your query is about EMail output for Purchase Order or Request for Quotation. However just to inform that output type and form/email templates are available for both of them which can be configured via Output Parameter Determination App and different configurations available via SSCUIs in CBC.

Please follow the scope 1LQ as reference for that, kindly refer to the Set-up Instructions provided as an accelerator.

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: LMS Implementation Plan
entry.content: I have a customer that would like an "example of an Implementation Plan for LMS?" Are you able to point me to where that information can be found? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Activate (create) an extension via service API using Postman
entry.content: Thank you very much, it helped me a lot how to add the postgreSQL extensions

entry.title: Re: Powerdesigner searching for an entity by GUID in VBA
entry.content: P.S. This new discussion forum kind of sucks... You cannot make new paragraphs in your reactions, you cannot post screenshots... You can do all of that in separate answer, but these answers cannot be posted as reaction to specific previous post... I hope SAP will work on that soon...

entry.title: Budget Availability Control and Commitments (SAP Project System)
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have been testing two S/4HANA system connections regarding the above-mentioned subject. In both systems, I have maintained the configuration for budget profile and availability control in which the system checks the budget on annual level (no overall and no release), and also maintaining the tolerances for the project's controlling area. In addition, I have created a project with its WBS elements, budgeted them using CJ30 transaction, and then created external activities in CJ20N to check the budget values against the configured tolerances. 

The main issue here is whenever one needs to check a commitment, should the external activity be released or the purchase requisition for this activity be switched to "immediately" or to "never"?. I am asking this due to the difference in output in both system connections. In the first system connection, the system checks the budget and commitment when saving the project in CJ20N, prior to releasing the activity. On the other hand, in the second system connection, the system checks the budget after one has set the release status or changing the purchase requisition to "immediately".

Just to make sure, I have double checked that both system connections have the exact same configuration (budget profile, defining tolerance limits, and activating the commitment management indicator within the controlling area "in activate project management in CO area within SAP IMG").

This issue is extremely important. I would like some help please.

Thank you in advance.

 

#SAP_PS #SAPPROJECTSYSTEM #SAP

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
GENERATIVE AI HUB SDK - Python Error
entry.content:
Hello,

Looking to deploy a simple model using generative-ai-hub-sdk (using python 3.12) and after setup, I'm finding the following error executing the following script from console (jupyter notebook): 

from gen_ai_hub.proxy.langchain.init_models import init_llm

prompt = """Translate to danish: Guten Morgen"""

llm = init_llm('gpt-35-turbo', temperature=0., max_tokens=256)
llm.invoke(prompt).content

-------------------------------------------------------

Error:

ValidationError: 1 validation error for ChatOpenAI

__root__

  Parameters {'top_p'} should be specified explicitly. Instead they were passed in as part of `model_kwargs` parameter. (type=value_error)

 

Any ideas?

Thanks!

entry.title: approve purchase orders through my inbox
entry.content:
I am looking for information to implement in the launchpad of my erp S/4 HANA 2022 FPS02 , the fiori application “My Inbox”. I understand that having an active and configured workflow, from “My Inbox” you can approve purchase orders.
(I found the app “My Inbox - Approve purchase order” but it is obsolete).
My question is the following since I did not find any information: When implementing my inbox, how does this application know that I want to approve purchase orders only and not do anything else?
I think this is very role related, but I would like someone who knows more about this to explain me better.
Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Service Now integration with SAP GRC
entry.content: I don't find the same in SICF - grac_user_acces_ws

entry.title: Re: SAC Excel Addin - Formula Error
entry.content:
Root cause - SAC Add-in formulas were not recognized by Excel, due to this excel functions turns to xludf.dummyfuntion. 

Solution - Disable or uninstall SAC Excel add-in and enable or re-install. Excel will start recognizing SAC formulas. 

Thank you @AkshatM for input, it helped.

entry.title: Re: how to activate SAML2 in SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Bruno,

it is relatively old, but did you check this blog entry?

SAP on Azure: Single Sign On Configuration using S... - SAP Community

Best regards

Anja

entry.title: How to make configurations for new button of SAP note 3210908
entry.content:
Hi There,

We have applied SAP Note "3210908 - Outbound NF-e: Enable 'Display PDF' button in J1BNFE monitor for SAP S/4HANA releases", for our customer in their S/4HANA system.

The new button comes with defaut service and form names in the code to be displayed, but we need to make configurations to display the current used smartform for the DANFE document of the customer.
I found no documentation explaining how to make configurations to use another form then the default one. 
I tryed to manage the output in the Output Management (found in SPRO), changing the application type configuration to use NAST settings, but it didn't work. 

Is there a way to display smartforms using this button or at least disable it?

@luize_boyen @Felipe_Silveira SAP S/4HANA SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil (SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica) for SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Custom events trigger from S/4 Hana to SAP BTP Event Mesh
entry.content:
Great blogs. Thanks for sharing.

Saurabh

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC - Sync GL Account Type and GL Account Dim
entry.content: Thank you!! It worked in Dev. The DELETE() after gl sync is not working in PROD. Any insights? checked data locks, checked user roles(BI Admin, Modular)

entry.title: CAP Adding custom linting rule for @sap/eslint-plugin-cds
entry.content:
Dear all

I am trying to create my own rule for eslint for linting *.cds files. The official package "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds" exposes a function "createRule()"  which seems to do exactly that. Unfortunately, I don't know how I can inject my new custom rule into the "cdsPlugin" eslint plugin, so that it gets executed, and I can configure it in eslint.config.mjs .

I did not find any documentation and I definitely don't want to expand the npm package @Sap/eslint-plugin-cds by hand. Because of this exposed api and createRule() function I thought it should be possible to create a rule in a separate file and inject the rule back to the plugin, does anyone know how ?

Thank you so much for reading 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Suite 7 Extension: What This Means for SAP ERP Human Capital Management Customers
entry.content:
Searching the SAP HCM for S4 documentation for mention of Performance Appraisal functionality.  We are using the Performance Appraisal flexible template toolset and want to confirm that this functionality is present in HCM for S4.  

 

Chris Thomas / Duke University

entry.title: Electronic Bank Statement Templates in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

To follow and test 1EG scope item, where we can find the bank statement templates (camt.052/53/54 or MT940) in SAP? In the "Manage Bank Statements" App, we can download the excel template only. 

Thanks for your kind response.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Islam, and I'm thrilled to be part of the SAP Community Beginner Corner! I work in an organization focused on providing comprehensive SAP training and implementation services to businesses across the Middle East. Our mission is to empower companies to fully leverage the potential of SAP solutions.

I'm eager to dive into the SAP world and learn from the expertise within this community. I'm also keen on sharing my knowledge and experiences as I grow in my SAP journey.

Feel free to connect with me via private message. I'm excited to get started!

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...
entry.content: seems weird -- i thought batch may be playing trick but i could not replicate-- when you are creating PI document --are you freezing the inventory? and entering batch in the PI document or let system determine at time of Count?

entry.title: Re: Successfactors Position Management - Transition process in Employee Central
entry.content: To confirm.  If on the position the FTE is 1 and the multiple incumbent allowed is No, then transition management will allow those attributes to remain as is but have a dual holder for a period of time?  Or does at minimum the multiple incumbent allowed have to be Yes?

entry.title: Reason for mouvement not showing in MIGO Good Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert, 

I have a business requirement to make the reason for mouvement mandatory for Good issue (201) in Migo

1- SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Movement Types -> Record Reason for Goods Movements  : I Mantianed the mouvement reasons and made the reason control  mandatory but the reason is not showing  (I made the same config for Mvt 122 , and 161 and it's working fine just the 201 is not working)

entry.title: Customer Payment Upload Program or Multiple Receipts from customer in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are now finding the solution of how to receive multiple incoming payments from customer in a day than using Automatic payment for Receivable in the system. Is there any upload or import function to upload the incoming payment like SO import or customer invoice import?

I really appreciate for your advice.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...
entry.content: We are not freezing inventory. SAP is taking book inventory at time of count. The batch is determined at time of PI document creation.

entry.title: Action [core] page-editor/create-custom-section failed with timeout. Please report issue.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using a SAP Fiori Elements Template in BAS. When i am adding a new section to my object page via page map, I am getting the following error:

Action [core] page-editor/create-custom-section failed with timeout. Please report issue.

Please look into it.

Thanks & Regards,

Sanya Govil

entry.title: Re: Shelf Life Expiry Management
entry.content: Very useful and precise note.  Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Get production operator user who confirmed the operat...
entry.content:
Hi @Attila_Jakosa,

Did you check app "Monitor Production / Planned Orders"? On the selection screen you see on top that "List:" is per default "Order Headers". You can select "Confirmations" from the drop-down. In the list view you will find the user ID in column "Entered by User".
For mapping a user name against user ID you could find this ID in the "User Actions Menu" (the circle with your initials) => "Settings" => "User Account" or in app "Maintain Business Users". 

A similar app is available for process orders: "Monitor Process / Planned Orders" in case you use process and not production orders.

Kind regards

Franziska

entry.title: Re: Integrate LinkedIn Learning courses with SuccessFactors Learning (LMS)- Part 2
entry.content: @former_member113361 @PV1519 @s0011735096 Hello, did you find out the cause of this error? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Get production operator user who confirmed the operat...
entry.content: Thank you very much. This is really helpful.

entry.title: Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in material master
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in the material master Sales: General/Plant & Basic Data 1 tab.
Usually, It appears below the Base Unit of Measure in Sales: General/Plant.

Can anyone explain? what could be the reason for it?

entry.title: Re: sd70av3a is not working for order-related invoices
Reporting accurately in Latest Goal Management
entry.content:
When reporting (Story or ad hoc or the out-of-the-box dashboard) on users' goals, if a manager has created (and therefore owns) a team goal but does NOT have that goal in his/her goal plan, the goal still appears in the report.  There seems to be no way of differentiating between a user who has created/owns a team goal but has only cascaded it, versus a team goal that is actually part of the creator/manager's goal plan.

e.g. Manager A has 8 goals in his plan totalling 100%, but has created 2 other Team Goals  (weighted 10% each) which he has assigned to his direct reports. Reporting on his goals will show 10 goals totalling 120%.  (The Direct Reports - assuming they too have not created Team Goals - will have these 2 goals correctly displayed alongside their individual goals).

Are we doing something wrong, or is this an "undocumented feature" of the Latest Goal Management offering?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Done!! 🥳🥳

entry.title: How to add parameters to GUI Transaction Fiori tile and access it in Custom Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello, I've been given the task of accessing a custom SAP GUI app from a custom Fiori app with preloaded values from the Fiori app. I've currently created a Fiori tile for the GUI app, and in the Target Mapping I have this filled out for the parameters:

 

The target names I've gotten from going to the transaction, hitting F1 when I'm in the parameter I want to fill clicking the technical information button, and using the Parameter ID
(e.g. when I click on Contract Number on the left, hit F1, use technical information button, this is the window that pops up, and I use the parameter ID that appears below)

In the custom fiori app I'm using this annotation:

<Record Type="UI.DataFieldForIntentBasedNavigation">
    <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="History"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Mapping">
        <Collection >
            <Record>
                <PropertyValue Property="LocalProperty" PropertyPath="SalesDocument"/>
                <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObjectProperty" String="AUN"/>
            </Record> 
            <Record>
                <PropertyValue Property="LocalProperty" PropertyPath="Product"/>
                <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObjectProperty" String="MAT"/>
            </Record> 
        </Collection>
    </PropertyValue>
    
    <PropertyValue Property="SemanticObject" String="ZMassUpdate"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Action" String="display"/>
    <PropertyValue Property="Inline" Bool="false"/>
</Record>

 

The button that this annotation provides does work to get me to the page of the new Fiori tile itself, but the parameters do not get filled out. 

Also it'd be great to know if it'd be possible to give the GUI transaction multiple SalesDocuments (the app itself is for changing information of the sales documents, so it'd be great to be able to select multiple rows, and have all the documents appear in the Contract Number field. The GUI app itself can handle multiple documents, just not sure how to give it multiple documents)

entry.title: Re: Gross weight and net weight fields are not showing in...
entry.content:
Hello @aravindrawat ,

Please check the configuration in SPRO.It look like the fields are hidden.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Where are Tcode that are deprecated in S/4 and a new one that added to S/4 HANA?
entry.content: You can get a list inSAP Fiori Apps Reference Library for your version running the apps available: Get SAP Fiori Apps Recommendatios or Fiori Upgrade Impact: https://help.sap.com/viewer/187a50cf8191418ab7b52505fcef1789/Ship/en-US/0f2b580b2e454a5a91b79119350ff4e7.html

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition: Innovation Highlights In The Latest Releases
entry.content:
In the current world, businesses cannot rely on a certain Unique Selling Point for their success. They must be proactive on all fronts to remain relevant, with technology being a pivotal pillar in driving organizational growth. The latest capabilities and technologies empower organizations to be a step ahead of the competition and utilize the opportunities presented by the global market.

Each release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition comes with a new set of capabilities bringing simplification, innovation, and automation to customers and their end users.

Stay updated with the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition to maximize your investment!

Explore in this blog significant innovations, which have been delivered with the latest releases:

 

Table of Contents

Application Innovation Highlights In Line Of Businesses

  • Supply Chain

  • Service

  • Asset management

  • Sales

  • Finance

  • Manufacturing

  • Sourcing and Procurement

User Experience Innovations

SAP Business Technology Platform Innovations

Innovations With Business AI and Joule

Innovations For Sustainability

Other Resources

 

Application Innovation Highlights

Throughout the latest releases, we introduced a wide range of application innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, encompassing apps, APIs, functionality, and extensibility across all lines of business. These major innovations differentiate significantly from older SAP S/4HANA releases and SAP ERP.

Supply Chain

  • Advanced Shipping and Receiving simplifies communication between Transportation Management, Extended Warehouse Management, Stock Room Management, Inventory Management and Physical Inventory, and Logistics Execution application. Simplified SAP TM and SAP EWM Integration support mixed and multi-warehouse scenarios within one single freight order (FO) and helps users coordinate the process steps from the arrival of trucks at the gate to the final goods receipt in the warehouse.

  • With Supply Creation-Based Confirmation (SBC), the availability check in sales orders is significantly enhanced. SBC is typically used by manufacturing industries especially in “make-to-order / Assemble-to-order” scenarios when there is not enough stock in the warehouse for the requested product. With SBC, during the ATP check, you can create supply elements for a multilevel BOM – with resource scheduling and reservations on capacities - to immediately cover the sales order requirements when there is not enough supply available in the system.

  • The Greenhouse Gas Emission feature enables you to set CO2 emissions parameters for vehicle types to drive optimization and insights on sustainability.

A freight order with calculated emission data

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Service

  • Service with Advanced Execution helps businesses to plan, execute, and bill services for complex assets or long-running services with multiple billing cycles. It supports service processes with longer service cycles and complex technical objects that require extensive planning and execution. The core characteristic of this process is the integration of the commercial aspects of Service with the planning and execution capabilities of Maintenance Management. The use of Maintenance Management capabilities means that you can use the task list that you are familiar with from the plant maintenance (PM) module of SAP ERP Central Component (SAP ECC) and SAP S/4HANA, to represent complex maintenance operations and activities for industrial equipment, pieces of machinery, and other classes of assets.

  • The scenario lets you have a cost-plus commercial arrangement, where the service is charged to the customer based on the actual cost of activities plus a surplus or margin on top of the costs. That’s what dynamic item processor (DIP) or resource-related billing does.

  • A new way to deal with revenues and costs for service processes called Item-Based Accounting, which lets you have an insight into a real-time margin analysis before month-end financial closing and revenue recognition, leveraging the new Event-Based Revenue Recognition.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Asset Management

  • Many innovations have been delivered to close the loop between asset strategy and asset execution. SAP Asset Performance Management (SAP APM) provides asset health insights from operational data and analytics and helps you craft cost-effective asset performance strategies for various asset classes.

  • SAP APM and S/4HANA work as a single system so that you can now directly reflect the strategic insights into the actual maintenance execution, enabling your maintenance teams to carry out different maintenance strategies appropriate for the asset criticality and class for optimal reliability and maintenance costs, and to measure efficiency and effectiveness of maintenance programs for continuous improvement.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Sales

  • Low-touch sales order processing increases the sales team’s efficiency and productivity. One example is the automatic creation of sales orders from unstructured data, like purchase orders in PDF or Image formats, with the combined usage of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, SAP Build Process Automation, and Document Information Extraction service, part of SAP AI Services.

  • The sales representative can import documents in XLSX format to create sales orders, sales quotations, sales contracts, or scheduling agreements.

  • The new Advanced Inter-company Sales process allows two affiliated companies to participate in a single inter-company process, e.g. a local sales office sells to a customer and the producing company delivers the goods directly to the customer or a local sales organization sells to a customer and a central warehouse delivers the goods.

Process Flow of Advanced Intercompany Sales

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Finance

  • The new Universal Parallel Accounting (UPA), which provides a harmonized architecture for ledgers and currencies, has been introduced. UPA provides a foundation for calculating and posting values per ledger and currency along end-to-end processes.

  • UPA is also the baseline for future innovations in Finance such as Value Chain Analysis and Transactional Carbon Accounting.

  • The integration scenarios with SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Group Reporting, SAP Advanced Financial Closing, and SAP Analytics Cloud have been continuously enhanced to accelerate the digital transformation in Finance.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Manufacturing

  • Material Requirements Planning (MRP) Live provides significant performance improvements, shorter planning cycles (multiple times a day), up-to-date supply and demand information on which to base decisions, matching demand and supply more efficiently, cross-plant planning, and being the foundation for predictive MRP.

  • Predictive MRP provides midterm planning solutions to influence capacity planning through MRP prediction, predicts and simulates capacity constraints based on current MRP results, simulating and resolving capacity and material gaps in a plant before they occur.

  • Demand-driven MRP helps to buffer inventory based on target levels in strategic locations, the replenishment is triggered based on the average consumption over the lead time, and specific MRP type controls the consumption-based planning through parameters for Qualified demand, Qualified supply, Safety stock, Lot size, Reorder point.

  • Collaborative MRP enables you to run material requirements planning in real-time and visualize results, visualize material bottlenecks, and resolve them with a simulative approach collaborate with suppliers on short-notice changes, and receive instant feedback through SAP Business Network for Procurement.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

Sourcing and Procurement

  • Introduced Lean Services - a new master data object “Product type” differentiates material and services (new material type SERV). Both can be mixed in a hierarchical structure, using Model Service Specifications. After the service has been confirmed, the flexible workflow can be used to approve the service entry sheets.
  • The new item category enhanced limit can be used for unplanned services. By leveraging data from SAP Sustainability Footprint Management, purchasers can track the carbon footprint of the products being requested in purchase requisitions.
  • Many investments have also been made in Central Procurement and Product Sourcing. 

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

 

User Experience Innovations

Each SAP S/4HANA release brings around 300 SAP Fiori apps, supporting improved processes and intelligent use cases.

  • New My Home Page from SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 as shown in User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise).
  • Share to Microsoft Teams as shown in User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise).
  • Spaces and Pages provide a business-meaningful hierarchy with multiple tile types, personalized sort through pinned spaces, and merging of spaces/pages for users in multiple business roles – as shown in Getting Started with Spaces and Pages and Merging Spaces and Pages.
  • Situation Handling use cases for reacting faster to business exceptions have grown rapidly from 20 in SAP S/4HANA 1909 to 125 SAP-delivered use cases in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01. You can even create your own custom situations. Refer to the blog series How to Start with Custom Situations and Custom Situation Cases: Configure Your Own Use Cases.
  • Introduction of the new embedded analytical app type Review Booklet Review Booklet for Group Financial Statements (Version 2.0).
  • System information toolbar, so users making key user extensions or testing always know which system they are working in as shown in User Experience Advances with SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 (Private Cloud and On-Premise).
  • Live Guided Tours when executing an app, Quick Tours that automatically appear for first-time users, and revision as shown in SAP Fiori: Tips & Tricks for Users of SAP S/4HANA.
  • Read-only review tools for sharing launchpad content and layout details with your audit team and other business stakeholders, such as SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – 3 simple use cases for Launchpad Content Aggregator.
  • Support for composite security roles in launchpad content and layout tools, including exposure of composite roles to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition. Refer to SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Composite Roles in launchpad content and layout tools.

Screenshot of the New My Home Page available from SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

 

SAP Business Technology Platform Innovations

Each release enhances integration through the SAP Business Technology Platform with seamless connectivity across SAP cloud solutions, AI use cases, augmented analytics, and extended custom options.

  • SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition launchpad to provide a unified entry point across SAP S/4HANA, your SAP Cloud solutions, and your custom apps built on SAP Business Technology Platform as explained in What Is SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition?
  • SAP Mobile Start as a native entry point to your launchpad on Apple and Android devices, including smartphones, Apple smartwatches, and Apple Vision Pro, as shown in Apple Vision Pro is available – SAP Mobile Start V1.10 is ready.
  • SAP Task Center as a unified approvals inbox across workflows from SAP S/4HANA, SAP SaaS solutions, and custom workflows built with SAP Build Process Automation – refer to the SAP Task Center one-pager summary.
  • Intelligent Situation Automation to automate handling of common business exceptions as shown in Intelligent Situation Automation – The next big step in Digital Transformation.
  • Easy integration of SAP Analytics Cloud stories and augmented analytics capabilities.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

 

Innovations With Business AI and Joule

AI-powered processes and with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition will pave the way to a new world of accelerated business, faster decision-making, and multiplied productivity. 

Joule, the AI copilot that provides intelligent answers drawn from the wealth of underlying business data:

  • Revolutionize the interaction, making every touchpoint count and every task simpler.
  • Have more productive business interactions using natural language for informational, navigational, and transactional assistance.
  • Gain smarter insights grounded in underlying business data and enriched by business context. 

Drive growth and foster innovation with AI:

  • Achieve improved finance excellence with AI that helps optimize working capital and closing functions.
  • Support operational excellence through optimized manufacturing and asset performance and elevated product quality.
  • Deliver advanced intelligent order fulfillment by streamlining and automating the order fulfillment process.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

 

Innovations For Sustainability

With an upcoming wave of mandatory ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) reporting regulations, SAP plans to deliver one solution to enable an auditable foundation for carbon reporting and analysis in state-of-the-art finance quality and related to the same existing financial dimensions which are used to steer the company and on which financial reporting is done today.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

 

Other Resources

For details on the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition innovations, please refer to the What´s New Viewer, to this blog about S/4HANA Cloud Release Highlights in 2023 and 2022, or to the SAP Community. Our roadmap for future releases evolves around the key themes of intelligent Cloud ERP, leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI), and Sustainability.

( 🔙 Table Of Contents)

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Toronto, Canada.

entry.title: Re: sd70av3a is not working for order-related invoices
entry.content:
We found the reason for it.

In Variant VF31, the billing plan field was not checked, and those invoices were for periodic billing, so the batch job did not consider those invoices.

entry.title: Re: Changing the Posting Date for Supplier Down Payment W...
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you try to withdraw the down payment request from approval (in the Verify Supplier Down Payment Requests app) and edit the posting date in the new opened period? Then you can submit it again for approval.

Regards,

Eduard

entry.title: Re: How do I prepare for S/4HANA as a Developer?
entry.content:
Hi, Do we use developer key on S/4 hana on premise? We understand there are no developer keys in S/4 Cloud.

 

Regards,

Vaibhav

entry.title: BADI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM not working as expeted
entry.content:
Hello,

I've implemented BADI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM, I have a custom field and i'm trying to clear the value of that field if a specific condition is fulfilled, the behavior is strange because i saw in debug that my code works and the value is cleared, but in the screen the field sometimes is not cleared, it's like works only the second time i input something.

Does anyone know what may be?

Thanks,
Ines Martins

entry.title: Smartforms print next pages no Items complete the windows
entry.content:
Hi! 

I created a Smartform with a 'MAIN' window for 5 items and if there are 6 items it goes to another page.
However, it is going to the next page with 2 items.
Could you tell me what the error is?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Time-Dependent Days of Supply.
entry.content:
Hi @so_nakashima,  

In your product master data the setting for safety stock method is Time-Dependent Days of Supply. In app "Maintain Time-Dependent Stock Levels" you have entered a value for Safety Stock but not for Safety DOS.

Please consider:

  • Safety DOS values are relevant only for materials with the safety stock method Time-Dependent Days of Supply.
  • Safety stock values are relevant only for materials using the safety stock method Time-Dependent Safety Stock.

If you change the safety stock method in product master to Time-Dependent Safety Stock you will see expected information in "Manage Material Coverage" app.

Kind regards
Franziska

entry.title: Re: How to access BTP Destination in VS Code
entry.content: @Akhilesh_u Did you try this yourselves, I still do not see any such option even after connecting with cloud foundry subaccount

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass Feature Adoption: ENABLEMENT AND TESTING TIPS
entry.content:
At SAP Fieldglass, innovation is in our DNA and so, finding a new solution or feature to enhance your external workforce and services procurement program is easy. The complexities lay within the potential impact that may arise when you implement the technology change.

To continuously improve your program and confidently adopt new features and functionality, you need to have a solid understanding of the effect on your various users (Hiring Managers, Workers, Suppliers), transactions, and downstream systems.

Below you’ll find enablement and testing tips that you can apply to each stage of the solution you are looking to adopt. Follow this step-by-step guidance for confident, thoughtful, and seamless delivery.

Step 1: Identify Solution

  • Become an expert on the solution
  • Align technology change to business driver and consider how success will be measured
  • Configure the solution in a test environment
  • Observe the design and user experience
  • Document the design and intended benefits
  • Collaborate with team & affected User(s) before agreeing to proceed

Step 2: Assess Impact

  • Visibility Assessment – understanding visibility and controls is critical to inform and educate
    • Who – By User? By User Role? Suppliers? Workers? All?
    • What – Instruction required? Purpose known?
    • When – At what point in the workflow is the new solution visible? Ex. after company config is enabled, after further Admin Object step up, after the Approval Group is edited, etc.
    • Where – Is the solution observed in the application (user interface), reporting, integration?
    • How – How will new objects or Users be associated to the new solution? Ex. manual upload, integration, company default
  • Transaction/Object Status Impact – some changes take effect immediately while others may not, depending on the status of transactions and objects. Identify examples of status variations and consider how the ‘visibility’ impact may vary based on object status. Also, if the solution being implemented is an added control, how will related ‘In progress’ transactions behave? Below are some examples to test:
    • Existing Objects
    • New Objects
    • Revised Objects
    • Reopened Objects
    • Current Users vs. New Users
  • Reporting Impact
    • Is there an impact to data fields in existing reports – especially any reports used for downstream system updates?
    • Are there new reportable fields related to the solution that could help you measure adoption & success? Search Analytics Menu: Report Fields
  • Integration Impact
    • Are any impacted data fields included in a download or upload? If yes, engage your Config Manager to discuss impact
    • Does your change impact the timing / trigger of a record in a download or upload? Or does it change behavior in being included or excluded from a download or upload?
    • Collaborate with your PMO team & affected User(s) for impact analysis and brainstorming before agreeing to proceed

Step 3: Validate Design

  • Create a list of test scenarios for each impact identified, variation in use case, and exception scenarios where you would expect no change
  • Execute each test scenario in the test environment (use appropriate User Role for each step – Hiring Manager, Supplier, Worker, PMO, etc.)
  • Observe each affected object in:
    • Application (as varying User(s) / User Roles)
    • Reports
    • Integrations
  • Adjust solution design until all test scenarios produce expected and desired results
  • Decide on a go-live approach. Will this roll out to all Users/Workers/Templates or select Users/Workers/Templates? Consider a phased approach if a production pilot is needed
  • Is change management needed? If so, identify a strategy
  • Document program change in the Reference Library, Contextual Help , or custom instruction if applicable
  • Collaborate with team & affected User(s) for go-live agreement

Step 4: Deliver Solution

  • Enable product changes – know at exactly which step your objects/ transactions/ Users are impacted
  • Monitor objects/transactions leveraging new solution in:
    • Application (user interface)
    • Existing Reports
    • Integrations
  • Create a report or process to verify solution has been adopted and success measures tied to business drivers are identifiable
  • Continuously monitor and adjust solution until success measures are met

 

Helpful Resources

Download the Feature Adoption: Enablement and Testing Tips one-pager

SAP Fieldglass Help Center (Troubleshooting)

SAP Help Portal (Documentation)

Product Success Collaboration

Test Environments

entry.title: What is the reason for getting the error message "No authorization to create objects in the system"?
entry.content:
When I tried to create a new ABAP repository object in a SAP BTP, ABAP Environement system I got the following error message "No authorization to create objects in the system".

What can be the reason for this behavior?
